scripts.start-dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env ts-node -r dotenv/config src/server.ts
scripts.start-prod-local: cross-env NODE_ENV=production DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.production node -r dotenv/config dist/server.js
scripts.start-dev-worker: cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env ts-node -r dotenv/config src/worker.ts
scripts.start-prod-local-worker: cross-env NODE_ENV=production DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.production node -r dotenv/config dist/worker.js
